title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 0–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kid as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just him comin' into this world and livin' would be un- forgivable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? Why the hell're you gettin' pissed off!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if the people in this world won't accept my existence...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'll become a great pirate and show 'em all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if they call me a villain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make the whole world know my name!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll race up the stairs of this great ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm thatch, commander of the 4th division.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
